text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
A fast auburn fox leaps across a sleepy hound.
The nimble fox bounded over the resting canine.
Lightning crackled across the summer sky at dusk.
Thunder rumbled as storm clouds gathered overhead.
The evening sky lit up with a brilliant flash.
Quantum computing leverages superposition and entanglement.
Qubits exploit quantum mechanics for parallel computation.
Entangled particles enable exponentially faster algorithms.
